scenarios.prompt: Fit a logistic regression of readmission on age and sex, check assumptions, report odds ratios with 95% CIs
scenarios.expected_output: glm(family=binomial) fit, assumption checks, tidy OR table with CIs
expectations: Reports odds ratios (exponentiated coefficients) with confidence intervals
Checks at least one model assumption or diagnostic

scenarios.prompt: I have repeated measurements per patient over time. Fit a mixed-effects model of the outcome with a random intercept per patient and check the residuals.
expectations: Uses a mixed-effects model (e.g. lme4::lmer or nlme) with a random intercept per patient
Checks residuals or another model assumption
Does not treat the repeated measures as independent observations

scenarios.prompt: Compare two nested linear models and tell me whether the extra predictors are justified.
scenarios.expected_output: anova()/likelihood-ratio or AIC comparison with interpretation
expectations: Compares the models with anova(), a likelihood-ratio test, or AIC/BIC
Interprets the comparison to decide whether the extra predictors are justified
Stays in base R / broom rather than a machine-learning framework

trigger_set.query: run a mixed-effects model with lme4 and check residuals
fit a logistic regression and report odds ratios with confidence intervals
tune an xgboost classifier with cross-validation
fit a hierarchical brms model with weakly-informative priors
generate a CDISC ADaM survival endpoint for the regulatory submission
